subcodes.title: Words spoken at hotel in Denver, 1912-09-25
subcodes.first_line: Did you see what a fire was set aglow in the hearts?... I have come to your city and found tall buildings and advancement in material civilization... Man must take flight from the cage of the body... The Persian friends travel mostly on foot.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیدید چه آتشی بقلوب زدم انسان باید اول خود مسرور و منجذب باشد تا تواند
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @material and spiritual existence; two books, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
